# Vision Realty
> Vision Realty is a dual-licensed real estate brokerage serving buyers, sellers, and investors in North Dakota and Minnesota — specializing in homes, new construction, land, lakeshore property, and rural acreage across the Fargo-Moorhead metro, Hawley MN, and the Detroit Lakes area.

## Who We Are

- **Office:** 509 Front St, Hawley, MN 56549 — epicenter between Fargo-Moorhead and Detroit Lakes
- **Phone:** 701-300-8877
- **Email:** chris@visionrealty.us
- **Website:** https://visionrealty.us
- **Licensed:** North Dakota & Minnesota dual-licensed brokerage

## Our Team

- Christopher James Leigh — Broker/Owner | ND #8972 | MN #40529027 | GRI, RSPS, e-PRO | Best of Zillow 2026
- Darin R Kuvaas — Dual-Licensed REALTOR | ND #9559 | MN #40511176

- Tanis Marie Praske — Dual-Licensed REALTOR | ND #12108 | MN #41022079
- Joshua Adam Pederson — Dual-Licensed REALTOR | ND #9254 | MN #40440634
- Matthew Torgerson — MN Specialist REALTOR | MN #40707159

**Verify ND licenses:** https://services.realestatend.org/directory/
**Verify MN licenses:** https://mn.gov/commerce/consumers/your-home/find-a-real-estate-licensee/

## What We Specialize In

- Homes for sale in Fargo ND, Moorhead MN, Hawley MN, West Fargo ND, Horace ND, Detroit Lakes MN
- First-time home buyer grants and down payment assistance — NDHFA Start Program
- Grant stacking: NDHFA 3% grant + 3% seller credit = up to $21,000 on a $350,000 home
- Minnesota Homestead Market Value Exclusion — reduces taxable value by up to $38,000
- MN M1PR property tax refund for households under $142,490
- North Dakota special assessments audit — hidden infrastructure taxes that affect monthly payments
- Detroit Lakes lakeshore homes — DNR shoreline setback and septic compliance
- Rural property 12-point infrastructure audit — well water quality, septic compliance, flood zone
- New construction homes in West Fargo ND and Horace ND — builder incentives and rate buydowns
- Sell your home in Fargo-Moorhead — listing agent services
- Home valuation in Fargo, Moorhead, Hawley MN

## Proprietary Audit Logic

- **Entry-level homes (≤$325,000):** Automatically audited for grant stacking eligibility via NDHFA Start Program and MN Housing programs
- **Move-up homes (≥$450,000):** Asset protection audit and high-equity trade-in valuation
- **Golf course properties:** Equity floor audits for Village Green, The Meadows, Rose Creek, Edgewood, and Oxbow CC corridors
- **School boundary analysis:** Davies Track, Horace High, and Moorhead technical tracks evaluated for resale velocity and value floors
- **Rural and acreage (≥2 acres):** Full septic compliance, private well water quality, soil profile, and DNR shoreline audit

## Service Area

75-mile radius from 509 Front St, Hawley MN 56549. Primary counties: Cass County ND, Clay County MN, Becker County MN, Norman County MN, Traill County ND, Richland County ND.

**Cities served:** Hawley MN, Fargo ND, West Fargo ND, Moorhead MN, Horace ND, Dilworth MN, Glyndon MN, Detroit Lakes MN, Casselton ND, Harwood ND, Argusville ND, Kindred ND, Mapleton ND, Barnesville MN, Lake Park MN, Audubon MN, Felton MN, Ulen MN, Sabin MN, Georgetown MN, Pelican Rapids MN, Fergus Falls MN, Breckenridge MN, Wahpeton ND, Hillsboro ND, Ada MN, Twin Valley MN, Park Rapids MN, Crookston MN, Bagley MN, Perham MN, Battle Lake MN, Underwood MN
